# Audio Player MCP Server

Audio Player MCP Server for AoiTalk project.

Original source: https://github.com/Here-and-Tomorrow-LLC/audio-player-mcp

## Usage

```bash
python src/tools/external/audio_player_mcp/player.py
```

## Environment Variables

- `AUDIO_PLAYER_DIR`: Directory containing audio files (default: ~/Music)

## Supported Formats

- MP3
- WAV  
- OGG
